beats.title: Through The Root
beats.boundaryReason: The session opens with setup and recap, then follows the party through the bone-like root tunnel, out into the Feywild, and along the first stretch of road as they take in the landscape, debate Holda's honesty, and decide to continue toward the manor; the next beat begins when Txarro's passive perception leads to the first body on the road.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u0053-u0067 recap the before-dawn descent and reopen in the root tunnel.
u0198-u0202 establish the party emerges just after sunset in the Feywild.
u0314-u0336 continue the same evening as the party leaves the ruined house and studies the road toward the manor.

beats.title: Bodies On The Road
beats.boundaryReason: Txarro's passive perception reveals the first mutilated body on the road; the party investigates the corpse, tracks, belongings, and further bodies before the next beat starts with their reaction to the danger and decision to seek divine and scouting help before approaching.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u0394-u0396 reveal the first body on the same road toward the manor.
u0645-u0652 keep the party on the same road toward the same manor.

beats.title: Weal, Woe, And Scouting
beats.boundaryReason: After the bodies sour the party's confidence, Kaito turns to Edric's faith, Txarro casts Augury, and the group scouts the manor and party with an owl before deciding how to approach; the next beat begins as they come up to the gate and the guards notice them.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u0711-u0728 continue the evening approach along the hedgerow.
u0740-u0753 give the Augury result in the same twilight approach.

beats.title: Well Met, Mortals
beats.boundaryReason: The party reaches the open gate, glimpses the masked lord through the owl, questions the doglike road guards about the bodies, the Twilight Kingdom, and the party, then pays entry with stories of dreams; the next beat begins when the guards let them through into the grounds.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u0965-u1004 show the party arriving at the gate in the same evening.
u1052-u1061 confirm they remain in the unmoving twilight of the Twilight Kingdom.

beats.title: The Ending Party
beats.boundaryReason: The party enters the grounds, feels the looped not-quite-frozen ending of the celebration, tests that they can leave, and splits into small social approaches while Kaito tries to engage the exhausted musicians; the next beat starts with Txarro and others speaking to the halflings.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u1378-u1399 describe the same evening party already ending.
u1403-u1437 clarify the party's repeated ending moment rather than a new day.

beats.title: The Old Halflings
beats.boundaryReason: Txarro, Kaito, and others question two drunken halflings, discover they are wildly out of time, learn they came from Chardon by rabbit and boat, and get their impressions of the Lord of the Manor before trying to lead them toward wine and other mortals; the next beat shifts to Ayveen and Edric finding the tiger-like guest.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u1580-u1586 keep the conversation in the party grounds.
u1661-u1695 show the halflings believe they arrived that same morning, while the party recognizes the time distortion.

beats.title: The Tiger's Story
beats.boundaryReason: Ayveen and Edric find the sober tiger-like guest, negotiate for his knowledge with Tarek's keys, and hear his account of Lord Revel, the naming contest, and the transformation into Lord Endless Ending; the next beat begins when Ayveen turns the story toward the immediate question of leaving and the truce.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u1875-u1917 keep the scene inside the same ending party.
u2061-u2163 narrate the tiger guest's backstory while the current party scene continues.

beats.title: The Truce Theory
beats.boundaryReason: The group connects the naming contest to Holda's mission, considers whether the Lord is bound by a truce he cannot break himself, learns another human may be moving through the house, and ends as Lord Endless Ending sends that human away and beckons Edric closer; the session closes on the party's working theory.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart and drEnd as 1740-10-05.
u2164-u2288 continue the same conversation with the tiger guest at the evening party.
u2313-u2331 mark the clock striking zero and the cliffhanger without evidence of a date change.
